content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Reviewed all three changed files (project.rs, bundle.rs, tests/cli.rs). The changes simplify `backfill_legacy_explicit_bead_flags` to treat any legacy bead with a `bead_id` as explicit, aligning it with the already-simplified `infer_bead_explicit_id` in bundle.rs. The duplicate title validation is broadened from title-only proposals to all non-explicit proposals, correctly catching canonicalized implicit beads with duplicate titles. All 153 CLI tests pass. The semantic change (beads at matching implicit slot positions are now marked explicit) is intentional and correct — it enables robust ID-based matching for legacy plans even when titles drift, which is covered by the new unit tests and the full CLI integration test. No bugs, safety problems, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
